creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 192993
update liferea to 1.12.3

somehow I totally lost track of this... anyway: here's liferea 1.12.3, released as per https://lzone.de/liferea/blog/Liferea+1.12.3+Released

Update is still easy and "works for me" and poudriere. While here, update WWW to point to the current official web site (and https).
